title: License-checked PMC-OA fact-extraction prototype (facts, not verbatim text)
context: PMC-OA is the highest license-risk source: it is license-heterogeneous, so each article's license is resolved per-article and only structured facts (never verbatim copyrighted text) are extracted. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Prototype license-checked PMC-OA fact extraction that reads only per-article-approved articles and emits structured facts with passage-level citations, never redistributing verbatim copyrighted text.
acceptanceCriteria: Only articles whose per-article license is resolved and approved are read.
Output is structured facts with passage-level citations (PMCID + location) — no verbatim redistribution of copyrighted text (esp. CC BY-NC / CC BY-NC-ND).
Extraction is assistive; uncertain extractions are flagged for human review, not asserted.
output: A PMC-OA fact-extraction prototype + a small license-checked extracted-facts dataset with passage-level citations, committed via PR.
